zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Randall Of Bath於1545年出生在英國薩默塞特巴斯時，他的父親Sir John Trask Randell Sr.22歲，母親Margaret Redman17歲。他於1570年4月30日與Johanna Webb在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1592年5月4日在他的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Randall Of Bath于1545年出生在英国薩默塞特巴斯时，他的父亲Sir John Trask Randell Sr.22岁，母亲Margaret Redman17岁。他于1570年4月30日与Johanna Webb在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1592年5月4日在他的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Randall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): common colloquial pronunciation of   Randolph  .

variants.name: Randell
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Americanized form of German   Randel  .

variants.name: Randon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel.
English: probably a variant of Randall , with assimilation of n-l to n-n.
French (northern): from the ancient Germanic personal name Rando, a short form of names based on the element rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’.

variants.name: Randol
meanings: English: altered form of   Randall  .

variants.name: Randal
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Norwegian: habitational name from the farm name Randal in Gulen, a compound of Old Norse runnr ‘copse, thicket, grove’ + dalr ‘valley’.

variants.name: Randles
meanings: English and Irish (Louth): variant of Randall , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In Ireland this is sometimes a variant of Reynolds .

variants.name: Randle
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Americanized form of German Randel or of its Bavarian variant Randl.

variants.name: Rendell
meanings: English (Somerset, Devon, and Dorset): variant of   Randall  .

variants.name: Randel
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
South German: variant of   Rand   3.

variants.name: Randolph
meanings: English and German: from Randolf, an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements rand ‘rim (of a shield), shield’ + wolf ‘wolf’. This was introduced into England by the Normans in Old French forms of two different ancient Germanic personal names which became confused with each other: Randulf (from rand ‘(shield-)edge’ + wulf ‘wolf’) and Rannulf (from hraf(a)n ‘raven’ + wulf ‘wolf’).

History: An American family bearing this surname are descended from William Randolph (c. 1651–1711), a planter and merchant, a member of a family that originally came from Sussex, England. William Randolph emigrated from Warwickshire to VA c. 1673. He was a forebear of Thomas Jefferson and Robert E. Lee. Randolph had seven sons, each of whom inherited an estate, the name of which was sometimes added to their own, such as Sir John Randolph of Tazewell. His great-grandsons included Edmund Randolph (1753–1813), first attorney general of the US and one of the framers of the US Constitution, and the diplomat and statesman John Randolph of Roanoke (1773–1833), who served as US minister to Russia.

variants.name: Rendall
meanings: English: variant of   Randall  .
Scottish: habitational name from Rendall (Orkney), named with a stream-name of uncertain origin + Old Norse dalr ‘valley’.
In some cases possibly also an Americanized form of Swedish   Rendahl  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Randall Of Bath was born in 1545, in Bath, Somerset, England, his father, Sir John Trask Randell Sr., was 22 and his mother, Margaret Redman, was 17. He married Johanna Webb on 30 April 1570, in Bath, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 4 May 1592, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Randall Of Bath est né en 1545, à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Trask Randell Sr., avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret Redman, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Webb le 30 avril 1570, à Bath, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 4 mai 1592, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Randall Of Bath 1545 in Bath, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Trask Randell Sr. 22 und seine Mutter Margaret Redman 17. Er hat am 30. April 1570 in Bath, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Johanna Webb geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 4. Mai 1592 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Randall Of Bath è nato il nel 1545 nel Bath, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir John Trask Randell Sr., aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Redman, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Webb il 30 aprile 1570, nel Bath, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 4 maggio 1592, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Randall Of Bath(이)가 1545년 영국 서머세트 바스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Trask Randell Sr.(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Redman(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1570년 4월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 바스에서 Johanna Webb(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1592년 5월 4일 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Randall Of Bath nasceu em 1545, em Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Trask Randell Sr., tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Redman, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Webb em 30 de abril de 1570, em Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Randall Of Bath родился в 1545 г. в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Trask Randell Sr. было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Redman, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Webb 30 апреля 1570 г. в местности бат, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 4 мая 1592 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Randall Of Bath nació en 1545, en Bath, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Trask Randell Sr., tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret Redman, tenía 17 años.
